name: golang-fullstack-best-practices
description: Comprehensive Go + GORM + PostgreSQL review skill for AI agents. Covers concurrency, clean architecture, idiomatic Go, query patterns, SQL syntax, performance, and migration safety.

sub_skills.name: clean-architecture
sub_skills.description: Layer separation, dependency rules, gRPC patterns

sub_skills.name: error-handling
sub_skills.description: General Go error patterns + PostgreSQL error codes and retry logic

sub_skills.name: design-patterns
sub_skills.description: Code smells, refactoring, Gang of Four patterns

sub_skills.name: gorm-query-patterns
sub_skills.description: GORM ORM query patterns, associations, transactions

sub_skills.name: postgresql-syntax
sub_skills.description: Raw SQL syntax, PostgreSQL functions, identifier quoting

sub_skills.name: query-performance
sub_skills.description: N+1, indexes, connection pool, batch processing
